title: Broak Vessery
content:
{{Top|canon=Vessery}} {{Character |type=Galactic Empire |image=[[File:Vessery_Defender-XWMG.jpg]] |name=Broak Vessery |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Black]] |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] **[[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] *[[Ciutric Hegemony]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Colonel, I know you developed some affection for the Rogues while you trained them."
"I did. They are fine pilots. I have little doubt they will acquit their portions of the operation admirably. My feelings and respect for them aside, Madam Director, my pilots and I stand ready to execute our orders as well.|Ysanne Isard and Broak Vessery|''[[X-Wing: Isard's Revenge]]''}} '''Broak Vessery''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[TIE pilot|TIE fighter pilot]] who held the rank of [[Colonel/Legends|colonel]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. ==Biography== Broak Vessery was a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] of the Imperial Navy who served under [[Ysanne Isard]] following the [[Death/Legends|death]] of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]]. Colonel Vessery's two [[TIE/d "Defender" Multi-Role Starfighter/Legends|TIE/D Defender]] squadrons, [[Interloper Squadron]] and [[Stranger Squadron]], were soon ordered by Isard to rescue the New Republic's elite [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] from above [[Corvis Minor V]], following a trap laid by [[Ysanne Isard (clone)|Isard's clone]] and [[Prince-Admiral/Legends|Prince-Admiral]] [[Delak Krennel]]. Following the engagement, Vessery revealed that he counted the deaths of Rogue pilots—which included two dead, [[Khe-Jeen Slee]] and [[Lyyr Zatoq]] and two severely injured, [[Wes Janson/Legends|Wes Janson]] and [[Asyr Sei'lar]]—as failures on his part and that, though a near impossibility, he should have been able to save them. Vessery, coupled with an unnamed Imperial flight instructor, under orders from Isard, then proceeded to train the surviving Rogues in the use of the Imperial TIE/D Defender, in the hope that an alliance between rival forces could be infiltrated into Krennel's forces and used to bring the rogue [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] down. [[Requiem Squadron]], under the command of [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]]' alter ego Antar Roat, managed to infiltrate Krennel's forces and brought down the [[Planetary shield/Legends|planetary shields]] protecting [[Ciutric IV|Ciutric]]. In the aftermath of the liberation of Ciutric and the deaths of Krennel, Isard's clone, and Isard herself, Vessery fled with two complete squadrons of TIE Defenders and their pilots. ==Personality and traits== Vessery was described as a tall, black-haired officer with sharp, noble features. He also had a nervous habit of picking invisible pieces of lint from his uniform and was very thoughtful about what he said. ==Appearances== *''[[X-Wing: Isard's Revenge]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *{{FFGXW|set=TIE Defender Expansion Pack|cardname=Colonel Vessery}} *{{FFGXW2|set=Galactic Empire Conversion Kit|cardname=Colonel Vessery|reprint=1}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Broak Vessery }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Vessery, Broak}} [[Category:Galactic Empire colonels]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Imperial Navy pilots of the Galactic Empire]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Personnel of Delak Krennel's regime]]
